differential_diagnoses: Dengue hemorrhagic fever with pulmonary involvement
Systemic vasculitis with diffuse alveolar hemorrhage
next_steps: Send serum for Hantavirus-specific serology (IgM/IgG) and viral RNA (RT-PCR)
Serum procalcitonin and inflammatory marker assessment
Consider bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) for fungal culture, galactomannan, and multiplex respiratory PCR panel
Discontinue unnecessary broad-spectrum antibiotics if culture results remain negative
Blood smear for evaluation of hematologic abnormalities
Contact public health authorities regarding potential Hantavirus exposure (Chascomús area)

differential_diagnoses: Diffuse alveolar hemorrhage secondary to systemic vasculitis
Severe dengue with capillary leak syndrome
next_steps: Urinalysis to assess for hematuria and proteinuria to evaluate for systemic vasculitis/leptospirosis
Measure LDH, haptoglobin, and review peripheral blood smear for schistocytes to assess for microangiopathic hemolytic anemia
Perform Bronchoalveolar Lavage (BAL) for viral/bacterial/fungal culture, PCR panels, and cytology to rule out hemorrhage vs. infection
Evaluate for autoimmune markers including ANCA and anti-GBM antibodies
Inquire specifically about exposure to animal excreta, bird droppings, or raw milk during the rural visit
Maintain lung-protective ventilation and consult Infectious Disease and Nephrology specialists
Notify local public health authorities of suspected Hantavirus case
